us_markets.note: Friday May 15 close — broad selloff, tech-led downturn
us_markets.sp500: -1.2% — pulled back from Thursday's all-time closing high
us_markets.key_story: Dow loses 500+ points as tech slumps and yields spike. S&P 500 retreats from new all-time high. Rising oil prices and bond yields trigger risk-off. Trump-Xi summit ends with no meaningful trade progress. Volatile week ahead with Nvidia and Walmart earnings.

asia_markets.hsi: down ~0.2% — mixed, weighed by Taiwan tensions
asia_markets.key_event: Trump-Xi Beijing summit concludes. Trump declines to commit to defending Taiwan. Strait of Hormuz commitment maintained.
